# Invoice Generator
> Free online tool to create professional PDF invoices instantly.

## Features
- Professional invoice form: sender, client, line items, tax, discount
- Live preview that updates as you type
- Download as PDF (generated entirely in your browser)
- 3 invoice templates: Clean, Classic, Modern
- Company logo upload (client-side only)
- Multi-currency support (USD, EUR, GBP, INR, BRL, CAD, AUD)
- Auto-calculated subtotal, tax, discount, grand total
- Save/load draft invoices in localStorage
- Auto-save every 30 seconds
- 100% client-side — no data sent to any server
- No registration required

## URL
https://www.freeinvoicegen.app

## Usage
Fill in your business details, client information, and line items. Choose a template, upload your logo, set currency and tax rate, then download a professional PDF invoice. Perfect for freelancers, contractors, and small businesses.
